schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get
Response Readiness Api V1 Ready Get

get.description:
Used by LoginGate to decide whether to show the first-admin form.

Reports `needs_bootstrap=true` only when auth is enabled AND no active
admin user exists in the DB. Once any admin is in place this flips to
false and stays false, so the bootstrap form can never be used to
overwrite an existing admin.

post.description:
One-shot creation of the first admin when the DB has none.

Refuses if auth is disabled (use AUTH_ENABLED=true), or if any active
admin already exists. Intended for use from the LoginGate's bootstrap
form right after `alembic upgrade head` on a fresh production DB —
saves an ops user from having to shell in and run
`veritas-api users create-admin`.

parameters.name: include_script

schema.description: Include full sbatch script body (can be large).
schema.title: Include Script

parameters.description: Include full sbatch script body (can be large).

get.description:
Return the last ~256 KB of stdout or stderr for a job, as plain text.

Useful for the UI's "view logs" panel when debugging a failed Slurm job.
The HPC stores logs on the cluster filesystem; in mock mode they're
locally readable, and in slurm mode they're readable once the cluster
has rsynced them back via the artifact-fetch step.

Stream the actual report artifact with auth applied.

Browsers can't attach a Bearer header to a plain anchor download, so the UI
fetches this endpoint as a blob (with the JWT/PAT) and triggers a save
locally. Unlike the `/static` mount, every request to this path is
authenticated and the user must be logged in.
Queue counts and active SSH connection for the Veritas operator UI (no admin gate).
Most-recent first. Filter by action, actor, or subject. Capped at 500/req.

Stream the audit log as CSV or JSON for compliance/IR exports.

Same filters as the list endpoint; capped at 50000 rows per request so a
single export can't blow out memory on the API host.

AdminPasswordResetResponse.title: AdminPasswordResetResponse
AdminPasswordResetResponse.description:
Returned ONCE on admin-mediated password reset. The plaintext password
is not persisted; deliver it to the user out-of-band (eg. encrypted email)
and have them log in to set their own.

ApiTokenCreateResponse.title: ApiTokenCreateResponse
ApiTokenCreateResponse.description:
Returned ONCE at creation. The plaintext token is never persisted; it
cannot be retrieved again, so clients must store it immediately.

HPCConnectionProbeRead.title: HPCConnectionProbeRead
HPCConnectionProbeRead.description: SSH test succeeded but row not persisted — id/created_at may be null.

JobPreviewRead.title: JobPreviewRead
JobPreviewRead.description: Slurm + pipeline runtime scripts as they would be submitted (no SSH/sbatch).
